title: Cobblemon: Fortune-able Evo Stones
description: Standalone release of a Cobblemon: Gear Shift tweak that allows Evolution Stones from Cobblemon to be mined with Fortune.
body:
**This is no longer needed in modern versions of Cobblemon, as the feature was integrated into the mod.**


Allows Evolution Stones to be mined with Fortune, with the same rates as Diamond Ore.

### Can I use this in a modpack?

MIT license, go wild.

### Forge or Fabric?

Data Pack! Works on both. Mod version also works on either loader.


***A mod version has been added! Make sure you download the proper version you want to use, either DataPack or Mod. The mod version is compatible with every mainstream mod loader, just like the datapack version.***
